## Morning Standup

- Discussed the new feature rollout plan
- Payment team reported a latency spike yesterday
- Alice will investigate the caching issue

## Bug Report: Auth Token Expiry

Users are getting logged out after 15 minutes instead of 24 hours.
Root cause: the token refresh endpoint returns seconds but the client expects milliseconds.
Fix deployed to staging.

## Architecture Review

Decided to use Redis Streams instead of Kafka for event processing.
Reasoning: simpler operational overhead, sufficient throughput for our scale.
